headline: Q1 Earnings Highlights: Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) Vs The Rest Of The Insurance Brokers Stocks
summary: As the Q1 earnings season wraps, let’s dig into this quarter’s best and worst performers in the insurance brokers industry, including Brown & Brown (NYSE:BRO) and its peers.

headline: WireX Systems and Brown & Brown Launch Executive Cyber Risk Program Focused on Quantum Exposure, AI-Generated Vulnerabilities, and Machine-Speed Exploitation
summary: These converging risks are fundamentally changing the threat landscape, and most organizations are not prepared for them. Today, WireX Systems, the cybersecurity company behind EvidenceOps, and Brown & Brown (NYSE: BRO), one of the largest independent insurance intermediaries in the United States, announced a partnership to help organizations understand, assess, and prepare for these emerging risks before they become business crises.
